leadText: Water has several referrals: The Water type, one of the eighteen types that a Pokémon can have. Water, one of the eleven types that a Pokémon can have in the TCG, represented by . For the Pokémon Egg Groups: Water 1 (Egg Group) Water 2 (Egg Group) Water 3 (Egg Group) Water tile, a type of tile in the Pokémon games. Water Deck (TCG), a theme Half Deck from Pokémon Play It!, specializing in Water Pokémon. Fresh Water, an item in the Pokémon games.
